## Formula card / 公式卡

- Card id:
- Title:
- Subject/chapter:

## Problem / 问题

Describe what is wrong: formula, condition, proof idea, example, mistake warning, tags, or classification.

## Suggested correction / 建议修正

Provide the corrected formula or explanation if available.

## Evidence / 依据

Textbook section, official syllabus point, derivation, or reliable public reference.

## Checks / 检查

- [ ] I checked whether the issue is in `handbook/formula-data.js`.
- [ ] I considered whether generated Markdown also needs updating.
